LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER DAO JENSEN'S HEARING ON ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF ADMINSTRATIVE MANDAMUS IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DECEMBER 20, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION AND REPLY PAPERS. PRIOR TO THE HEARING, THE COURT RECEIVED A COURTESY COPY OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH; CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

DECLARATION OF MATTHEW L ZELASKO IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR DISCRETIONARY RELIEF PER CCP 473(B) IN SUPPORT OF PETITIONERS PETITION FOR ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS FILED BY PETITIONER JENSEN, DAO BICH

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER DAO JENSEN'S ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF ADMINSTRATIVE MANDAMUS IS DENIED. HAVING INDEPENDENTLY REVIEWED THE EVIDENCE, THE COURT FINDS THAT THE OFFICER HAD A SUFFICIENT BASIS TO STOP PETITIONER FOR A VIOLATION OF VEHICLE CODE SECTION 21658 AND THAT, IN ANY EVENT, THE EVIDENCE CONCERNING HER DRIVING UNDER THE INFLUENCE WOULD BE CONSIDERED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Alternative Writ Of Adminstrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Feb-19-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: MATTHEW ZELASKO-BARRETT, ESQ., 415.234.8301, FOR PETITIONER DAO BICH JENSEN.
JOHN T. MCGLOTHLIN, DEPUTY ATTORNEY GENERAL, 510.622.2224, FOR RESPONDENT DEPARTMENT OF MOTOR VEHICLES.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PETITIONER DAO JENSEN'S Alternative Writ Of Adminstrative Mandamus IS Denied. Having independently reviewed the evidence, the Court finds that the officer had a sufficient basis to stop Petitioner for a violation of Vehicle Code section 21658 and that, in any event, the evidence concerning her driving under the influence would be considered. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

Notice Of Hearing On Alternative Writ Of Adminstrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Dec-20-2012 Continued To Feb-19-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER DAO JENSEN's Hearing On Alternative Writ Of Adminstrative Mandamus is continued to February 19, 2013 at 9:30 am in Dept. 302 on the Court's own motion. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976.

Notice Of Hearing On Alternative Writ Of Adminstrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Nov-20-2012 Continued To Dec-20-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER DAO JENSEN'S HEARING ON ALTERNATIVE WRIT OF ADMINSTRATIVE MANDAMUS.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued on the court's own motion to December 20, 2012. The court has courtesy copies of the opposition and reply papers. Prior to the hearing, the court received a courtesy copy of the moving papers. (302/EHG) Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not reported
